decisionRules.rule: Finish all steps without waiting for approval unless security-related
Always notify Matt with results — never finish silently
Confirm save with path, size, and verification (ls -lh)
Use simple analogies (git = save points, files = notebook)
Always use $1,950/mo — $950 clients are exceptions not the norm
Read ui-ux-pro-max, typography, tailwind skills first. Cache bust after changes.
Verify live URL / test actual output — never claim done without checking

antiPatterns: Asking Matt to attach browser tab
Posting to Twitter without explicit approval
